title: stevia alpina var. glutinosa
intro: Stevia alpina var. glutinosa, also known as Stevia glutinosa, is a plant species within the Stevia genus, native to the Andean region of South America. It is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. Stevia glutinosa is believed to have several health benefits, including lowering blood pressure, reducing the risk of heart disease, and acting as an antiviral agent. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as tea, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
